category_sources: Official reuse.software site describes REUSE as recommendations and tooling for clear, machine-readable licensing and compliance.
source_facts.description says REUSE is a tool for copyright and license recommendations.
display_name_sources: Official reuse.software homepage brands the project as REUSE.
docs_sources: Official Read the Docs site is dedicated documentation for the reuse tool and command-line reference.
Official reuse.software site documents the REUSE recommendations, specification, FAQ, and developer resources.
repo_sources: GitHub fsfe/reuse-tool currently labels itself as a mirror, so Codeberg is preferred as the official source-control URL.
Official reuse.software developer resources identify Codeberg fsfe/reuse-tool as the source repository.
tags_sources: Official reuse.software homepage describes license compliance, machine-readable licensing, and bill-of-materials support; official docs cover reuse lint/spdx commands.
source_facts.description identifies copyright and license recommendations.
